'''Boranall''' was a temperate [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="Atlas" /> In [[3640 BBY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> Boranall was [[Battle of Boranall|attacked]] by the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] warship ''[[Ascendant Spear]]'' in order to suppress rebellion in the [[Boranall system/Legends|Boranall system]].<ref name="Annihilation" />

{{Talesstart}}
Many centuries before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], [[Shang-Troy Thanabo]] was directed to this planet by [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. He discovered a pregnant woman, whose [[The Twins (Jedi)|twin sons]] he helped deliver. He took them as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]].
{{Talesend}}
